expectations.text: Recognizes Nx + Angular + .NET + Docker and produces a coherent plan covering all four
expectations.evidence: PLAN.md opening 'Nx Monorepo (Angular + .NET) in Docker — Setup Plan' and numbered steps cover all four dimensions

expectations.text: Dockerfile installs both Node and the .NET SDK in a single image
expectations.evidence: Dockerfile.dev in outputs uses FROM node:20 base + dotnet-sdk-8.0 apt install

expectations.text: Plan includes `nx add @nx/dotnet` for .NET plugin registration

expectations.evidence: PLAN.md step 5: `npx nx configure-ai-agents` with explanation

expectations.text: Plan scaffolds a sample Angular app AND a sample .NET project so the workspace is immediately functional
expectations.evidence: Angular app `web` created via create-nx-workspace appName flag; `api` webapi via `dotnet new webapi -o ./apps/api`

expectations.text: Assistant does not silently skip the AI-agents configuration step
expectations.evidence: Step 5 dedicated to AI agents, not skipped; the subagent also flagged the assumption it made
